title: Extract preflight logic from run_session
goal: Move preflight validation logic into a dedicated module without changing runtime behavior
scope: Add focused regression tests for extracted preflight flow
allowed_changes_detail: orchestration/run_session.py::imports and preflight invocation wiring only
acceptance_criteria: AC-109a-01: preflight success path behaves the same after extraction [test_preflight_success_behavior_unchanged]
AC-109a-02: missing required session keys still fail with the same message after extraction [test_preflight_missing_keys_behavior_unchanged]
AC-109a-03: dirty worktree guard behavior remains unchanged after extraction [test_preflight_dirty_worktree_behavior_unchanged]
AC-109a-04: run_session imports and uses orchestration.preflight without changing provider flow [test_run_session_delegates_to_preflight_module]
AC-109a-05: local validation suite still passes after extraction [manual_4_command_verification]
